# Obligatory AI Generated Comment Guideline

Apply this skill whenever creating new files or classes.

## Required rules

1. In every newly created file, include the exact text: `generated by AI in Github cloud`.
2. In every newly created class, include the exact text: `generated by AI in Github cloud`.
3. Keep the marker text exact and unmodified.

## Checklist

- Confirm each new file includes the required marker text.
- Confirm each new class includes the required marker text.
- Verify exact spelling and casing: `generated by AI in Github cloud`.
